title: ZeroPress Theme Manifest (Runtime v0.6)
description: Metadata manifest for a ZeroPress theme that targets the v0.6 runtime.

menuSlotDefinition.description: Admin-facing helper metadata for a single recommended menu id declared by the theme.
menuSlotDefinition.markdownDescription: Admin-facing helper metadata for a single recommended menu id declared by the theme. This does not assign a menu; it only documents a commonly expected id.

title.description: Human-readable label shown in helper UIs.
title.markdownDescription: Human-readable label shown in helper UIs, for example `Primary Menu` or `Footer Menu`.

description.description: Optional help text that explains where this menu slot is typically rendered.
description.markdownDescription: Optional help text that explains where this menu slot is typically rendered, for example `Main header navigation`.

widgetAreaDefinition.description: Admin-facing helper metadata for a single recommended widget area id declared by the theme.
widgetAreaDefinition.markdownDescription: Admin-facing helper metadata for a single recommended `widget_area_id` declared by the theme. This does not assign widgets; it only documents a commonly expected area id.

title.description: Human-readable label shown in helper UIs.
title.markdownDescription: Human-readable label shown in helper UIs, for example `Sidebar Widgets` or `Header Widgets`.

description.description: Optional help text that explains where this widget area is typically rendered.
description.markdownDescription: Optional help text that explains where this widget area is typically rendered, for example `Widgets shown next to article and page content`.

site_metaDefinition.description: Admin-facing helper metadata for a single site.meta key understood by the theme.
site_metaDefinition.markdownDescription: Admin-facing helper metadata for a single `site.meta` key understood by the theme. This is a hint only; ZeroPress core does not compare it with preview-data values.

title.description: Human-readable label shown in helper UIs.
title.markdownDescription: Human-readable label shown in helper UIs.

description.description: Optional help text that explains how the theme uses this metadata key.
description.markdownDescription: Optional help text that explains how the theme uses this metadata key.

type.description: Optional recommended scalar value type for authoring tools.
type.markdownDescription: Optional recommended scalar value type for authoring tools.

default.description: Optional suggested default value for authoring tools.
default.markdownDescription: Optional suggested default value for authoring tools.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URI or path used by editors and tooling. ZeroPress core does not interpret this value.
$schema.markdownDescription: Optional JSON Schema URI or path used by editors and tooling. ZeroPress core does not interpret this value.

name.description: Human-readable theme name shown in admin UIs and listings.
name.markdownDescription: Human-readable theme name shown in admin UIs and listings.

namespace.description: Publisher or organization slug that owns the theme.
namespace.markdownDescription: Publisher or organization slug that owns the theme. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

slug.description: Unique theme identifier used in package and registry contexts.
slug.markdownDescription: Unique theme identifier used in package and registry contexts. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

version.description: Theme version in semantic versioning format.
version.markdownDescription: Theme version in semantic versioning format, for example `0.6.0`.

license.description: License identifier for the theme. Use an SPDX id from the allowlist or a LicenseRef-* identifier for commercial, marketplace, proprietary, or otherwise non-SPDX terms.
license.markdownDescription: License identifier for the theme. Use an SPDX id from the allowlist or a `LicenseRef-*` identifier for commercial, marketplace, proprietary, or otherwise non-SPDX terms.

runtime.markdownDescription: Target ZeroPress theme runtime version. This schema currently supports `0.6` only.

author.description: Optional display name for the theme author or maintainer.
author.markdownDescription: Optional display name for the theme author or maintainer.

description.description: Optional short summary used in theme listings.
description.markdownDescription: Optional short summary used in theme listings.

thumbnail.description: Optional thumbnail URL or asset path used for previews.
thumbnail.markdownDescription: Optional thumbnail URL or asset path used for previews.

links.description: Optional public links for theme information, support, marketplace listings, and license terms.
links.markdownDescription: Optional public links for theme information, support, marketplace listings, and license terms. Values must be absolute `http`, `https`, or `mailto` URLs.

features.description: Optional theme capability flags exposed to the runtime and tooling.
features.markdownDescription: Optional theme capability flags exposed to the runtime and tooling. These flags declare whether the theme is designed to support specific feature surfaces such as comments, newsletter islands, post indexes, or search UI.

comments.description: Whether the theme supports the comments island capability.
comments.markdownDescription: Whether the theme supports the comments island capability.

newsletter.description: Whether the theme supports newsletter UI capability.
newsletter.markdownDescription: Whether the theme supports newsletter UI capability.

post_index.description: Whether the theme supports post index routes.
post_index.markdownDescription: Whether the theme supports post index routes. When `false`, build tooling treats the post index as disabled even if preview data requests one.

search.description: Whether the theme supports static search UI backed by ZeroPress search artifacts.
search.markdownDescription: Whether the theme supports static search UI backed by ZeroPress search artifacts. Search support is opt-in; omitted behaves like `false`.

menu_slots.description: Optional map of menu slots declared by the theme.
menu_slots.markdownDescription: Optional map of recommended `menu_id` values declared by the theme. Keys are stable identifiers such as `primary`, `footer`, or `docs-sidebar`. This field is informational helper metadata for admin UIs and documentation; it does not assign menus or affect build behavior.

propertyNames.markdownDescription: Recommended `menu_id` identifier. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and internal hyphens only.

widget_areas.description: Optional map of widget areas declared by the theme.
widget_areas.markdownDescription: Optional map of recommended `widget_area_id` values declared by the theme. Keys are stable identifiers such as `sidebar`, `header`, or `docs-sidebar`. This field is informational helper metadata for admin UIs and documentation; it does not assign widgets or affect build behavior.

propertyNames.markdownDescription: Recommended `widget_area_id` identifier. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and internal hyphens only.

site_meta.description: Optional map of site.meta keys understood by the theme.
site_meta.markdownDescription: Optional map of `site.meta` keys understood by the theme. This field is informational helper metadata for admin UIs and documentation; it does not assign values or affect build behavior.

propertyNames.markdownDescription: `site.meta` key identifier. Use lowercase letters, digits, underscores, and internal hyphens only.

collection_slots.description: Optional map of collection slots declared by the theme.
collection_slots.markdownDescription: Optional map of recommended collection ids declared by the theme. This field is informational helper metadata for admin UIs and documentation; it does not assign collections or affect build behavior.

propertyNames.markdownDescription: Recommended collection identifier. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and internal hyphens only.

sidebar.title: Sidebar Widgets
sidebar.description: Widgets shown next to article and page content

header.title: Header Widgets
header.description: Optional widgets shown in the header area

show_sponsor_banner.title: Show Sponsor Banner
show_sponsor_banner.description: Whether to display the sponsor banner.
